decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/inventory.json) confirms ai_RNbBHYYO is a Group with only Text children ai_RNbBHYYP (title) and ai_RNbBHYYQ (subtitle) — no Icon entity under the workplace card header. SettingsWorkplaceTab.tsx adds a prototype Building2 icon in a rounded span beside the header, so ui_evidence for ai_RNbBHYYO is partial. Valid ui-fidelity polish on a named decompose ui_ref, but priority is low, all criteria_audit ACs pass, functional_ok=true, and no downstream item depends_on SET-08 header structure. Remove the invented icon (or map to an IR icon if one is added later) in a SET-08 IR parity polish pass before visual QA.

IR re-read of SET-08 ui_refs (ai_RNbBHYYM through ai_RNbBHYYb) shows no Text or Group element for a linked-on timestamp; bTIja workflow parity in AC-3 gates validate/persist workplace link, not a read-only linked date line. workplaceApi.ts correctly persists workplace_linked_at in profiles.onboarding_data and loadWorkplaceLink returns linkedAt, but Bubble workplace tab has no corresponding static copy or ui_ref to render. FV-3 passes on persist-and-reload of name/email; hiding linkedAt in the form is consistent with IR scope, not a missing AC.

summary: 0 fix_now, 1 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 remove invented Building2 icon from ai_RNbBHYYO header (SET-08 IR parity polish). Accepted: C-2 workplace_linked_at persist without UI display matches Bubble workplace tab IR (no linked-timestamp ui_ref). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
